abilities.name: The Viper
abilities.reload: 0.5 seconds (initial animation) / +0.25 seconds per bullet / 3.5 seconds (full reload animation)
abilities.dps: 136.5 while firing (63.86 overall w/ full reload, 34.78 w/ reload after each shot)

abilities.name: Take Aim (ADS)
abilities.description: Hold to zoom in, increasing damage and accuracy but slowing rate of fire.
abilities.reload: 0.5 seconds (initial animation) / +0.2 seconds per bullet / 2.9 seconds (full reload animation)
abilities.dps: 114.33 while firing (41.3 overall w/ full reload, 32.98 w/ reload after each shot)

abilities.name: Coach Gun
abilities.description: Blast enemies in front of you and knock yourself backwards.

abilities.name: Dynamite
abilities.description: Throw an explosive that detonates after a short delay or immediately when shot.
abilities.damage: 50 - 20 (explosion, enemy) / 100 over 5 seconds (burn, enemy) / 25 - 10 (explosion, self) / 50 over 5 seconds (burn, self)

abilities.name: B.O.B.
abilities.description: Deploy Bob. He charges forward and knocks enemies into the air, then attacks with his arm cannons.

minor.name: Remote Detonator
minor.description: After using Dynamite, pressing Ability 2 again causes it to explode after a 0.5 second delay.

minor.name: Double-Barreled
minor.description: Knocking an enemy back with Coach Gun briefly allows it to be used again with 25% reduced knockback.

major.name: Viper's Sting
major.description: Hitting 2 consecutive scoped shots on a target deals 25 extra damage and reloads 1 ammo.

major.name: Airburst
major.description: Dynamite has a 40% increased detonation radius while airborne and refunds 3 ammo when thrown.
